---
title: "Hand Demo"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Hand Demo}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
library(mypaintr)
knitr::knit_hooks$set(mypaint = knitr_mypaint_hook())

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.ext = "png",
  fig.width = 5,
  fig.height = 4,
  fig.keep = "none",
  mypaint = TRUE
)

plot_with_hand <- function(..., null = FALSE) {
  title <- deparse(substitute(list(...)))
  title <- sub("list\\((.*)\\)",  "\\1", title)
  plot.new()
  plot.window(c(0, 10), c(0, 10))
  title(title)
  
  set_brush(NULL)
  if (null)
    set_hand(NULL)
  else 
    set_hand(hand(seed = 1, ...))
  rect(1, 1, 4, 4)
  rect(6, 6, 9, 9, col = "green4")
  rect(1, 6, 4, 9, col = "darkred", density = 5)
  draw_rough_rect(6, 1, 9, 4, col = "orange2")
  arrows(1, 5, 9, 5)
}
```

```{r}
plot_with_hand(NULL)
```


```{r}
plot_with_hand()
```


```{r}
plot_with_hand(bow = 0)
```


```{r}
plot_with_hand(wobble = 0)
```


```{r}
plot_with_hand(multi_stroke = 2)
```


```{r}
plot_with_hand(width_jitter = 0.24, multi_stroke = 2)
```


```{r}
plot_with_hand(endpoint_jitter = 0)
```

```{r}
plot_with_hand(endpoint_jitter = 0.05)
```
